note: Change of hands starting round f. 278v; larger, unrubricated headings from then onwards
Thuluth used for headings on ff. 280v, 283v, 288r, 290v, 294r, 293v, 297v, 303r, 302v, 307r, 307v, 313r, 317r

translation: The copying finished on [difficult to read], which fell on 18 in the month of Shawwāl in 640 of the Hegira [AH]
